title: Bernstein-UCB: tighter bounds via empirical variance
setting: Show that using Bernstein concentration instead of Hoeffding tightens UCB constants when arm variance sigma_i^2 << 1. Derive the exact instance-dependent improvement factor.
known_results: Bernstein bound: sqrt(2 sigma^2 log(1/delta) / n) + 2 log(1/delta) / (3n)
UCB1 uses Hoeffding: sqrt(2 log t / n)

title: MOSS minimax optimality
setting: Show that MOSS (Minimax Optimal Strategy in the Stochastic case) achieves R_T = O(sqrt(KT)) without the log(T) factor, matching the minimax lower bound up to constants.
known_results: Standard UCB1 achieves O(sqrt(KT log T))
MOSS index: hat{mu}_i + sqrt(log(T / (K * N_i)) / N_i)

title: KL-UCB asymptotic optimality for Bernoulli bandits
setting: Prove that KL-UCB achieves the Lai-Robbins lower bound asymptotically for Bernoulli bandits: lim sup R_T / log T <= sum_i Delta_i / KL(mu_i, mu*).
known_results: KL-UCB index: max{q : KL(hat{mu}_i, q) <= log(t)/N_i}
Thompson Sampling also achieves this bound
